creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri Feb  7 12:57:18 2014
New Revision: 343222
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/343222
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r343222/

Log:
  - Update to 1.4.2
  - Stage support
  
  PR:		186419
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/devel/libshhmsg/Makefile
  head/devel/libshhmsg/distinfo
  head/devel/libshhmsg/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/libshhmsg/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libshhmsg/Makefile	Fri Feb  7 12:56:21 2014	(r343221)
+++ head/devel/libshhmsg/Makefile	Fri Feb  7 12:57:18 2014	(r343222)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	libshhmsg
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://shh.thathost.com/pub-unix/files/
 DISTNAME=	shhmsg-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -10,17 +10,19 @@ DISTNAME=	shhmsg-${PORTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Library for displaying messages
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+LICENSE=	ART10
 
-USES=	uidfix
+USES=		uidfix
 MAKEFILE=	${FILESDIR}/Makefile.lib
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 MAKE_ENV=	WITHOUT_PROFILE=yes __MAKE_CONF=/dev/null SRCCONF=/dev/null
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=		DOCS
+
 post-install:
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
-.for file in CREDITS README shhmsg.txt
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${file} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+.for i in CREDITS README shhmsg.txt
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${i} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
 .endfor
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/libshhmsg/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libshhmsg/distinfo	Fri Feb  7 12:56:21 2014	(r343221)
+++ head/devel/libshhmsg/distinfo	Fri Feb  7 12:57:18 2014	(r343222)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (shhmsg-1.4.1.tar.gz) = f65d45d3a5e415b541a1975e13fe7c5b58e21df6e9306cc3f7901279a9f6d461
-SIZE (shhmsg-1.4.1.tar.gz) = 10909
+SHA256 (shhmsg-1.4.2.tar.gz) = 88c69e3f0b920b1ef93f6c10f354786f171d7cb3ab170a463bb9ab8bbf13a02b
+SIZE (shhmsg-1.4.2.tar.gz) = 11125

Modified: head/devel/libshhmsg/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libshhmsg/pkg-plist	Fri Feb  7 12:56:21 2014	(r343221)
+++ head/devel/libshhmsg/pkg-plist	Fri Feb  7 12:57:18 2014	(r343222)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@ include/shhmsg.h
 lib/libshhmsg.a
 lib/libshhmsg.so
 lib/libshhmsg.so.1
-%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/libshhmsg/CREDITS
-%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/libshhmsg/README
-%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/libshhmsg/shhmsg.txt
-%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm share/doc/libshhmsg
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/CREDITS
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/shhmsg.txt
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
